narrative:
Fairview Park-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 254 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.2 percentage points.
